content.en:
The Heavenly Wound Realm Lord couldn't get much useful information from the battle arena, and he also knew that this kind of powerhouse who had comprehended the extradimensional rules couldn't use ordinary deduction treasures to track down the deduction.

However, he learned that the Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm was tracking a half-step extradimensional realm, so he left the branch.

If you track down that half-step extradimensional realm, you may be able to know who the forces behind it are.

So, he immediately returned to the headquarters and took out the peep ~ heavenly mirror of the Peep Heaven Pavilion.

The Sky Voyeur Mirror is a medium extra-dimensional Dao soldier, and it is a special extra-dimensional Dao soldier, the value is not lower than that of the general high-level extra-dimensional Dao soldier, it can be used for deduction, creation, tracking and other functions, but the price to pay to urge the Sky Speculator Mirror is not small.

Even a second-realm transcendental realm powerhouse like the Heavenly Injury Realm Lord didn't dare to urge the Peep-Heavenly Mirror for a long time.

Rumble!!!!!

The Sky Speculator Mirror was urged, and a silk thread spread out, connecting the dead Asahi Realm Lord, and then trying to contact the half-step Extradimensional Realm.

Little by little, time passed.

Suddenly.

This thread is broken.

"Can't find it!"

"Damn, that half-step transcendent realm has either comprehended the rules of transcendental realm, or he is the doppelganger of a second-level transcendental realm powerhouse. "

The Heavenly Wound Realm Lord was extremely annoyed.

In this way, it is impossible to track down who the enemy is.

Right now, unless he enters the Five Thousand Realm, he will invite a third realm extradimensional realm powerhouse who is good at tracking.

However, the price to pay was too much for him to bear.

It was impossible for the Heavenly Pavilion to pay such a price for a mere first-realm extradimensional realm.

Besides, this time it may be a vendetta, and the other party didn't really make a move against Peep Heaven Pavilion.

So, the Heavenly Wound Realm Lord just pretended to track it down and didn't care about it anymore.

......

"Peeping Heaven Pavilion really can't find me!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

This time he killed the Lord of the Asahi Realm, he had a clear understanding of his strength, and at the same time he was in a very good mood.

However, he is not arrogant either.

The first realm of the Asahi Sea Realm Lord is just an ant-like existence in the transcendent realm, and there are second, third, and fourth realms on it.

The second realm can kill the first realm in seconds, and the third realm can also kill the second realm in seconds.

He is now facing an opponent in the third realm, and the opponent can kill him in an instant with a single breath.

Therefore, his strength is not something to be proud of.

In the following years, he searched for various extradimensional resources and materials in the 6000 Territory, he was different from other extradimensional realms, and other extradimensional realms were still afraid of those extradimensional creatures or extradimensional races at the level of extradimensional realms, but he was not afraid, it was a big deal to lose a replica body.

With such a desperate effort, he gained a lot of wealth in a short period of time.

"At present, the cultivation cannot be improved quickly, and the super-dimensional rules cannot be improved quickly, if you want to improve your strength, you still have to rely on the super-dimensional Dao soldiers!"

Ye Tianke was very aware of the power of the Transcendent Dao Soldier, he had relied on a fragment of the Transcendent Dao Soldier to kill a weaker half-step Transcendent Realm with the cultivation of the Peak Realm God.

It can be seen that the strong man of the super-dimensional Dao soldiers.

He killed the Asahi Sea Realm Lord and obtained two extra-dimensional Dao soldiers from the Asahi Sea Realm Lord, both of which were low-level super-dimensional Dao soldiers, but one of the defensive super-dimensional Daoist armors was pierced by his extra-dimensional annihilation technique, and it has not yet been repaired.

The other super-dimensional Daoist soldier is a sword, but this sword is the famous weapon of the Xuhai Realm Lord-Xuhai Sword, such a super-dimensional Daoist soldier does not dare to take it out, otherwise Peeping Heaven Pavilion must know that he killed the Xuhai Realm Lord.

Therefore, he must refine a super-dimensional Dao weapon of his own.

Of course.

He can also ask a superdimensional realm master to refine a superdimensional dao soldier, but what he needs is not a superdimensional dao soldier, so it is easy to expose the secret that he has a large number of extradimensional dao soldiers, and maybe it will also attract the greed of the second extradimensional realm.

Therefore, it is most cost-effective to refine the super-dimensional Dao soldiers by yourself.

Moreover, he had comprehended the rules of extra-dimensionality, and it was easier to refine low-level extra-dimensional dao soldiers.

But to refine a super-dimensional dao soldier, you also need the refining method of a super-dimensional dao soldier.

He doesn't yet have the refining method of a superdimensional Dao soldier.

"Go to the Garan Chamber of Commerce!"

Ye Tian came to the branch of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce in the Extreme Yang Realm, and a superdimensional realm of the Jialan Chamber of Commerce received Ye Tian.

Ye Tian got straight to the point.

"Yes. The Xuanxing Realm Lord nodded and agreed, "But our Jialan Chamber of Commerce only sells the refining methods of low-level extra-dimensional Dao soldiers, and the refining methods of medium-level extra-dimensional Dao soldiers are not allowed to be sold. "

0 begging for flowers

Medium extra-dimensional dao soldiers are almost the hole cards of the major super-dimensional forces, and naturally it is not allowed to sell the refining method of this kind of super-dimensional dao soldiers.

"No problem!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, the Xuanxing Realm Lord came up with more than a dozen refining methods for super-dimensional Dao soldiers.

Ye Tian took a look at it and finally chose three of them.

A low-level extra-dimensional soldier in the defensive class - Black Scale True Armor.

A low-level super-dimensional soldier of the speed class - Sky Patrol Sky Wing.

A low-level extra-dimensional soldier of the attack class - the Sky Killing Spear.

The refining method of these three low-level extra-dimensional dao soldiers is very valuable, and once purchased, it is not allowed to be leaked, so it is natural to make a superdimensional oath.

If it's leaked, how can the Garan Chamber of Commerce sell it!

"The refining method of these three extra-dimensional Dao soldiers, the total price is 300 billion Gala Treasure Coins, it shouldn't be expensive!"

The Xuan Star Realm Lord asked.

"It's not expensive!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

This is the refining method of the extra-dimensional Dao soldier, and it is worth this price.

If it is just entrusted with refining super-dimensional Dao soldiers, it will naturally not be expensive.

But if he wants to refine it himself, he has to pay this price.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out the equivalent of 300 billion Gala Blue Treasure Coins and took away the refining methods of these three extra-dimensional Dao soldiers.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian gradually gathered the three extradimensional materials of the super-dimensional dao soldiers, and then began to refine them.

It is very difficult for a super-dimensional dao soldier to refine it, Ye Tian has never refined it, even if he comprehends the extra-dimensional rules, it is impossible to refine it easily.

If you can refine a super-dimensional Dao soldier, you are a Dao-level treasure refiner.

Soon, the first refining failed.

Ye Tian started the second refining, but the second refining still failed.

The third time, the fourth time, the wasted materials were enough to bankrupt many extradimensional realms.

However, Ye Tian didn't care.

After refining it thirteen times, he finally refined a low-level super-dimensional dao soldier.

After that, his success rate became higher and higher, and the more and more super-dimensional Dao soldiers he refined became more and more earthy.
